name: Retention Bundle
short_description: Complete player retention stack — Daily Rewards, Achievements, Season Pass, Profile, Level, Quest, Economy and Store. All coupled and signal-linked.
description:
Everything you need to keep players logging in every day:
• Daily Reward — Tres based, 5 animation presets, 7 days + bonus day, random or sequence mode
• Achievements — Modular, signal based, separate panel for newly unlocked
• Season Pass — Free and premium tracks, level based unlock
• Profile System — Multi-profile, cloud saved via Supabase, avatar picker, username editing
• Level System — XP modes: LINEAR / EXPONENTIAL / CUSTOM, icons, banners, titles per level
• Quest System — Tres based, sequence chains and solo quests, signal based progress tracking
• Economy — Tres based multi-currency, balance check before spend
• Store System — Tres based, unlimited items, category tabs, purchase validation
All 8 systems are coupled together and signal-linked — drop in once, wire signals, done.

name: CityMaker PRO
short_description: Production-ready procedural city generator — 165+ models, lane roads, traffic lights, collisions, NPC markers. One click, 14MB city.
description:
Complete procedural city generation system for Godot 4:

• Lane-based roads — Customizable lane count and width, automatic junctions, corners and T-splits
• Boundary ring — Outer road frame with proper corner pieces
• District system — CIVIC (hospitals, schools, police, courts, libraries), COMMERCIAL (shops, restaurants, gas stations, stadiums) and RESIDENTIAL (houses, apartments, towers)
• Traffic lights — 4 lights at every junction, automatically rotated and positioned
• Street lights — Placed along all roads and boundaries with adjustable spacing
• Road markers — 35+ navigation markers for NPC pathfinding (junctions, corners, T-splits)
• Landmark markers — Quest-ready markers for missions (hospital, school, police, gas station, etc.)
• Collision system — Box collisions for performance, trimesh for complex models, ground collision for player walking
• MultiMesh optimization — 40x40 grid (1600 tiles) in just 14MB, 2400+ objects
• 165+ low-poly models included — 18 base/road, 84 buildings, 63 decor
• Fully configurable — grid size, lane count, seed, decor density, light spacing, building spacing

How to use:
1. Copy proceduralcity.gd to your project
2. Place world_template.tscn and models in res://
3. Open script → File → Run (Ctrl+Shift+X)
4. City generates and opens automatically

Requirements:
• Godot 4.0 or higher
• No external dependencies

Performance:
• Recommended: 40x40 grid
• Max: 100x100 grid
• 40x40 file size: 14MB
• Generation time: ~5 seconds

Free version available. Upgrade to PRO for production-ready cities.

name: Daily Rewards
short_description: 7-day login reward system with bonus day — Tres based, 5 claim animations, random or sequence mode. Drop into any Godot 4 game.
description:
Tres based daily reward system built for production games:
• 7 reward days + bonus day on streak completion
• Two modes — DAYS (fixed sequence) or RANDOM (shuffled each cycle)
• 5 claim animations — Zoom, Bounce, Shake, Flash, Spin
• Supabase backend — streak and claim state stored server-side, not local
• Streak logic — handles missed days, consecutive logins, and cycle resets correctly
• Signal based — one signal per day, connect and handle rewards your way
• Self-cleaning — queues free after claim, zero scene pollution
Drop in the scene, connect signals, done.

name: Achievements
short_description: Modular Tres-based achievement system with a separate newly unlocked panel. Signal based, works in any Godot 4 game.
description:
Tres based modular achievement system:
• Add any number of achievements via .tres files — no code changes
• Separate panel for newly unlocked achievements on session start
• Signal based unlock — connect achievement_unlocked and handle rewards
• Progress tracking per achievement — works for count-based and one-shot types
• Fully customisable icons, titles and descriptions per achievement
Drop in, configure .tres files, connect signals.

name: Season Pass
short_description: Tres-based season pass with free and premium tracks, level-based unlock. Signal based.
description:
Tres based modular season pass:
• Separate free and premium reward tracks
• Level based unlock — rewards unlock as player levels up
• Add any number of tiers via .tres files
• Signal based — connect tier_unlocked and deliver rewards your way
• Works standalone or paired with the Level System
Configure tiers in .tres, connect signals, ship.

name: Profile
short_description: Multi-profile system with Supabase cloud save, avatar picker and username editing. Full stats tracking.
description:
Complete profile management system:
• Multiple profiles — create, switch, delete
• Supabase backend — profiles saved and loaded from cloud, not local file
• Avatar picker — bundled avatars plus custom image import
• Username editing with password verification
• Full stats tracking — playtime, sessions, wins, streaks and more
• Debounced save — multiple writes collapse into one Supabase call
• Signal based — profile_loaded, profile_updated, auth_failed, logout_occurred
Drop in as AutoLoad, wire signals, all retention managers plug into it automatically.

name: Level
short_description: Tres-based level system — LINEAR, EXPONENTIAL or CUSTOM XP modes. Icons, banners, titles per level. Signal based.
description:
Fully customisable Tres based level system:
• Three XP modes — LINEAR, EXPONENTIAL, CUSTOM thresholds
• Level up and level down signals
• Max level cap configurable
• Per-level icons, banners and titles — UI ready out of the box
• Works standalone or as the unlock driver for Season Pass
Configure in .tres, connect level_up signal, done.

name: Quest
short_description: Tres-based quest system — sequence chains and solo quests, signal based progress tracking.
description:
Tres based quest system with two quest types:
• Sequence Quests — step by step chains, next quest unlocks on completion
• Solo Quests — standalone objectives with individual tracking
• Progress tracking per objective — count based or one-shot
• Signal based — quest_completed fires with reward data
• Add any number of quests via .tres files, no code changes
Configure quests in .tres, connect signals, deliver rewards.

name: Economy
short_description: Tres-based multi-currency system — add any number of currencies, balance check before spend. Signal based.
description:
Tres based currency and economy system:
• Add any number of currencies via .tres — coins, gems, tokens, anything
• Balance check before spend — never goes negative
• Earn, spend and balance signals for UI updates
• Works standalone or as the payment layer for the Store System
Configure currencies in .tres, connect signals, ship.

name: Store
short_description: Tres-based in-game store — unlimited items, category tabs, purchase validation. Requires Economy system.
description:
Tres based in-game store system:
• Add any number of items via .tres files
• Category tabs — organise items by type
• Purchase validation — checks balance via Economy system before completing
• Signal based — item_purchased fires on success
• Works with any currency from the Economy system
Requires Economy System. Configure items in .tres, connect signals.

name: Monetization Bundle
short_description: Full monetization stack — AdMob, Unity Ads and Redeem Store. Keep 97% of revenue by bypassing Google IAP.
description:
Complete monetization toolkit for Godot 4 Android games:
• AdMob — Banner, Interstitial, Rewarded, Native ads with Unity Mediation. Smart caching, test mode, analytics callbacks
• Unity Ads — Banner, Interstitial, Rewarded with auto-retry and 12 lifecycle signals
• Redeem Store — Players buy codes outside the game, redeem inside. Bypass Google's 30% cut entirely and keep 97% of every sale
All three production tested. Drop in the plugins, configure your ad IDs and redeem codes, ship.

name: AdMob Plugin for Godot 4.4
short_description: Production-ready AdMob plugin — banner, interstitial, rewarded and native ads with Unity Mediation. Android only.
description:
Complete AdMob integration for Godot 4.4 Android:
• Ad types — Banner, Interstitial, Rewarded, Native
• Unity Mediation support built in
• Smart ad caching — ads preloaded before you need them
• Test mode built in — no accidental live ad requests during development
• Analytics callbacks — track impressions, clicks, revenue events
• Async loading — non-blocking, no frame drops
Production tested on Play Store. Drop in the plugin, set your ad unit IDs, call show().

name: Unity Ads Plugin for Godot 4.4
short_description: Complete Unity Ads plugin — banner, interstitial, rewarded with auto-retry and 12 lifecycle signals. Android only.
description:
Complete Unity Ads SDK 4.12.3 integration for Godot 4.4 Android:
• Ad types — Banner, Interstitial, Rewarded Video
• Auto-retry on failure — ads reload automatically without your code
• Smart ad caching — always ready when you need them
• 12 lifecycle signals — full visibility into ad state
• Zero manifest editing required
Production tested. Drop in the plugin, set your Game ID, call show().

name: Redeem Store
short_description: Bypass Google IAP entirely — sell codes outside your game, players redeem inside. Keep 97% of every sale.
description:
Redeem Store system for Godot 4 — the simplest way to keep your revenue:
• Players buy codes from your website, WhatsApp, anywhere outside the game
• Code validation built in — single use, expiry support
• Reward delivery on redeem — connect signal and deliver any in-game reward
• Bypasses Google Play's 30% cut completely
• Works with any payment method you already use
No plugin required. Set up your code list, connect redeem signal, ship.

name: Social Bundle
short_description: Complete social layer — Presence, Private and Global Chat, Friend System, Voice Chat. All coupled together.
description:
Full social stack for Godot 4 multiplayer games:
• Presence — Real-time online, offline and in-game status for all players
• Private and Global Chat — Chat with a person, team, guild or everyone. Real-time via Ably
• Friend System — Add, remove, send and accept friend requests. Full friend management
• Voice Chat — Private voice channels, push-to-talk or open mic, mute per player
All four systems coupled and linked together. Wire once, social layer is live.

name: Private and Global Chat
short_description: Real-time chat — private messages, team chat, guild chat and global channel. Powered by Ably.
description:
Real-time chat system for Godot 4 multiplayer:
• Private messages — one to one direct chat
• Team and guild channels — scoped chat rooms
• Global channel — all players in one channel
• Real-time delivery via Ably — no polling, instant updates
• Message history included
Requires Ably account (free tier available). Drop in, set channel names, connect signals.

name: Add, Remove, Send, Accept Friend
short_description: Complete friend management — add, remove, block, send and accept requests. Online presence per friend.
description:
Full friend management system for Godot 4:
• Send and accept friend requests
• Remove and block players
• Online and offline presence per friend
• Friend list UI included
• Signal based — friend_added, request_received, friend_removed
Drop in, connect to your profile system, wire signals.

name: Voice Chat
short_description: Private voice chat over network — push-to-talk or open mic, mute per player, low latency.
description:
Voice chat system for Godot 4 multiplayer:
• Private voice channels only — no proximity or global
• Push-to-talk or open mic mode
• Mute and unmute per player
• Low latency networked audio
• Works alongside text chat systems
Drop in, configure channel, ship.

name: AI Tools Bundle
short_description: Complete AI toolkit — Groq NPC, Gemini NPC, Google TTS voice, 3 image generators, voice commands and language translator. 8 integrations.
description:
Everything you need to add real AI to your Godot 4 game:
• Groq — Fast conversational NPC using Llama 3.3 70B. Human-like responses, memory context
• Gemini — Reliable conversational NPC using Google Gemini. Alternative to Groq
• Google TTS — Give your NPC a real human voice. Free, multi-language
• Freepik Image Gen — Generate and apply AI images to any mesh at runtime
• Cloudflare Image Gen — Alternative image generation via Cloudflare Workers AI
• Stability Image Gen — Generate art and textures at runtime via Stability AI
• Voice Command — Players talk to NPC using voice. AI maps speech to game commands
• Language Translator — Switch entire game UI to any language at runtime with one click
All 8 integrations are separate utilities — use any combination.

name: Groq NPC
short_description: Fast AI NPC using Groq Llama 3.3 70B — conversational, memory context, voice ready. Plug into any Godot 4 game.
description:
Groq AI integration for conversational NPCs in Godot 4:
• Powered by Llama 3.3 70B via Groq — fastest inference available
• Conversation memory context — NPC remembers what was said
• Mission and quest trigger support — NPC responses can fire game events
• Voice output ready — pairs directly with Google TTS
• Signal based — response_received fires with NPC reply text
Requires free Groq API key. Drop in, set system prompt, connect signals.

name: Language Translator
short_description: Switch your entire game UI to any language at runtime with one click. AI powered, no translation files needed.
description:
Runtime language switcher for Godot 4:
• Switch entire game UI to any language with one tap
• AI powered — no manual translation files, no CSVs
• 100+ languages supported
• No game restart required — switches live
• Works on all UI nodes
Requires API key (free tier available). Drop in, call switch_language(), done.

name: Networking Bundle
short_description: Three complete network architectures — P2P with host migration, Dedicated Server and Relay Server. Pick what fits your game.
description:
Every multiplayer setup covered in one bundle:
• P2P + Host Migration — Zerotier ENet P2P with IP broadcast. Session survives when host leaves — migrates automatically to next peer
• Dedicated Server — Authoritative headless WebSocket server deployable on Render or Replit. Free cloud tier compatible
• Relay Server — Always-on WebSocket communication bridge for Render or Replit. NAT-friendly, works from any device
All three are standalone — use any one or combine them for different game modes.

name: P2P Setup with Host Migration
short_description: Zerotier ENet P2P with IP broadcast and automatic host migration. Session never drops when host leaves.
description:
P2P multiplayer setup with host migration for Godot 4:
• Zerotier ENet P2P — private virtual IPs, real IPs never exposed
• IP broadcast — players discover each other automatically
• Host migration — if host disconnects, session moves to next peer automatically
• No lobby restart, no lost progress on host change
• Up to 50 players
Drop in scripts, set Game ID, call host() or join().

name: Dedicated Server
short_description: Authoritative headless WebSocket server for Godot 4 — deployable on Render or Replit free tier.
description:
Dedicated authoritative server setup for Godot 4:
• Headless WebSocket server — runs as authoritative game server
• Deployable on Render or Replit — free cloud hosting compatible
• Anti-cheat architecture — server validates all game state
• Client-server transport layer included
• You handle game RPCs and logic — server handles connection and authority
Deploy to Render, set server URL in client, ship.

name: Relay Server
short_description: Always-on WebSocket relay server for Godot 4 — deployable on Render or Replit, NAT-friendly.
description:
WebSocket relay server setup for Godot 4:
• Communication bridge — routes all multiplayer traffic through the relay
• Deployable on Render or Replit — free cloud tier compatible, always on
• NAT-friendly — works from any device, any network
• Late-joiner support — new players catch up on missed state
• Drop-in client script included
Deploy relay, drop in CGClient script, set relay URL, ship.

name: Universal Managers
short_description: Essential AutoLoad managers — Relay Manager, Auth Manager, Local Storage and Cloud Storage. Drop in and wire.
description:
Four essential AutoLoad managers for any Godot 4 game:
• Relay Manager — Simplified WebSocket relay connection usable inside any network system
• Auth Manager — Complete authentication flow with Supabase. Email, session, logout
• Local Storage Manager — Save and load any data type to local storage with one call
• Cloud Storage Manager — Save and load any data to Supabase storage with one call
All four are standalone AutoLoads — use any combination.

name: Relay Manager
short_description: Universal WebSocket relay AutoLoad — simplified relay connection inside any Godot 4 network system.
description:
Universal relay manager AutoLoad for Godot 4:
• Simplified WebSocket relay connection — one call to connect
• Usable inside any network system — P2P, dedicated server, standalone
• Handles reconnection logic automatically
• Signal based — connected, disconnected, message_received
Drop in as AutoLoad, set relay URL, call connect().

name: Mobile Control Bundle
short_description: Complete mobile input system — Joystick, Action Buttons, Touch Camera with Gyro and in-game UI Layout Editor.
description:
Full mobile control system for Godot 4 — everything your game needs for touch input:
• Joystick — Floating or fixed, dead zone adjustment, smooth movement
• Buttons — Action name or key trigger, visual feedback, assign and done
• Camera with Gyro — Touch drag-to-rotate with properly calibrated gyroscope
• UI Editor — Players reposition buttons on screen and save their layout
All four work together out of the box. Drop in the scenes, configure once, ship.

name: Joystick
short_description: Self-contained mobile joystick for Godot 4 — floating or fixed, dead zone adjustment, smooth movement.

Drop-in mobile joystick for Godot 4:

Drop in the scene, connect to your movement script, done.

name: Buttons

description:
Mobile action button system for Godot 4:

name: Camera with Gyro

Touch camera with gyro for Godot 4:

name: UI Editor
short_description: In-game UI layout editor — players drag and reposition buttons, layout saves automatically.

In-game mobile UI layout editor for Godot 4:

Drop in, register your buttons, ship.

name: Open World Framework
short_description: Complete open world game template — Chunk Manager, AI NPC, Vehicle, Minimap, Job System and P2P Trade.
description:
Full open world game framework for Godot 4:
• Chunk Manager — Stream and unload world sections based on player position. Performance safe for large maps
• AI NPC — Casual conversational companions and task based NPCs powered by Groq and TTS
• Vehicle — Multiplayer synced vehicle with enter/exit, driver switching and passenger support
• Minimap — GTA style minimap with small corner and fullscreen toggle, destination markers, legends
• Job System — Assign jobs, track progress, deliver rewards on completion
• P2P Trade — Player to player trade with listing screen, renting, selling and more
All systems coupled together. The most complete open world starting point for Godot 4.

name: Chunk Manager
short_description: Chunk-based world streaming for large maps — load and unload sections based on player position.

Chunk manager for large open world maps in Godot 4:

Drop in, set chunk size, connect to player node.

name: Vehicle
short_description: Multiplayer-synced vehicle with enter/exit, driver switching and passenger support for Godot 4.

Multiplayer vehicle system for Godot 4:

• Passenger support — multiple riders, each synced

name: Minimap
short_description: GTA-style minimap — corner and fullscreen toggle, destination markers, player and enemy markers.

GTA style minimap for Godot 4:
• Small corner minimap with fullscreen toggle
• Destination markers with distance display
• Player position marker — rotates with player
• Enemy and NPC markers with legend
• Works in any map size
Drop in minimap scene, register markers, ship.

name: Job System
short_description: In-game job system — assign jobs, track progress, deliver rewards on completion.
description:
Job management system for Godot 4 open world games:

Drop in, configure jobs, connect job_completed signal.

name: Battle Royale Framework
short_description: Complete BR framework — Inventory, Weapon, Combat, Game State, Plane, Zone, Stats Logger and Combat Logger.
description:
Production-ready Battle Royale framework for Godot 4:
• Inventory — Drag and drop with Tres system. Weapon types, accessories, item tracking. Mobile and PC
• Weapon — Tres based, unlimited weapons. Guns, melee, throwables. One script, no duplication
• Combat — Synced with GameState, Inventory and Weapon. Melee, ranged, hitbox, damage, health
• GSM — Game State Manager per player and global. Match start, end, join, leave
• Plane — Random path, auto eject, parachute drop to landing zone
• Zone — Math based danger and safe zone with visual preview. Works on any map size
• Stats Logger — Kills, accuracy, score, playtime tracked per PeerID. Realtime UI ready
• Combat Logger — Cloud stats update paired PeerID to UserID. Killfeed, damage events
All 8 systems coupled together. The most complete BR starting point for Godot 4.

name: Inventory
short_description: Drag and drop inventory — Tres based, weapon types, accessories, tracking. Mobile touch and PC mouse.
description:

Drop in, configure item .tres files, wire signals.

name: Weapon
short_description: Tres-based weapon system — unlimited weapons, guns, melee and throwables. One script, multiplayer ready.
description:

• Add unlimited weapons via .tres — no code duplication

• Pairs with Combat and Inventory systems
Configure weapons in .tres, drop in the manager, ship.

name: GSM
short_description: Game State Manager — per player and global state. Handles match start, end, join and leave.
description:
Game State Manager AutoLoad for Godot 4 multiplayer:

• Handles match start, end, player join and leave
• Signal based — state_changed fires on every transition
• Works with relay, P2P and dedicated server setups
Drop in as AutoLoad, connect signals, ship.

name: Zone
short_description: Math-based BR zone system — danger and safe zone calculation with visual preview. Works on any map size.
description:
Battle Royale zone system for Godot 4:
• Math based zone calculation — no hardcoded positions
• Danger zone and safe zone with visual preview ring
• Works on any map size — configure radius and shrink rate
• Multiplayer synced — all players see the same zone
• Damage outside zone — configurable tick damage
Drop in zone manager, configure shrink settings, ship.

name: Stats Logger
short_description: Real-time stats tracking per PeerID — kills, accuracy, score, playtime. UI ready.
description:
Stats logger for Godot 4 multiplayer games:

• Real-time UI updates — connect to any label or progress bar
• Works in relay, P2P and dedicated server setups

Drop in as AutoLoad, log events, bind to UI.

name: Combat Logger
short_description: Cloud stats tracking — PeerID paired to UserID. Killfeed and damage events for cloud storage.
description:
Combat logger for Godot 4 multiplayer games:
• Maps PeerID to UserID — cloud stats tied to real player accounts
• Killfeed events — who killed who, with what, when
• Damage events — damage dealt and received per player
• Pushes to cloud on match end — works with Supabase
Drop in as AutoLoad, log combat events, push to cloud.

name: Grid City Framework
short_description: Complete grid city builder — click and place, Blender pipeline, JSON import/export, one-click city generation.
description:
Grid city builder framework for Godot 4:
• Grid City — Click and place roads, buildings and decorations. Ghost preview, anchor snapping
• Blender Pipeline — Export layout from Blender using Multimesh for best performance on large maps
• JSON Import/Export — Save and load city layouts as JSON. Share layouts with other players
• One Click City — Generate a complete city procedurally with one click
All systems included. Design manually or generate procedurally.

name: Wave-Based TPS Framework
short_description: Complete wave-based third-person shooter — 4 enemy types, NavMesh, stuck detection, weapon system, stats screen.
description:
Production-ready TPS framework for Godot 4:
• Wave System — Configurable waves with increasing difficulty per wave
• 4 Enemy Types — Melee, Ranged, Tank, Fast — each with unique AI behaviour
• NavMesh Pathfinding — Full navigation mesh for all enemy movement
• Stuck Detection — Enemies auto-detect and recover when stuck on geometry
• TPS Controller — Smooth third-person movement and camera
• Weapon System — Tres based, multiple weapon types
• Stats Screen — Kills, accuracy, waves completed, time survived

All systems coupled. The fastest way to start a wave-based TPS in Godot 4.

name: Ably
short_description: Ably realtime integration — presence and pub/sub text chat without a dedicated server.
description:
Ably realtime integration for Godot 4:
• Presence — who is online, offline and in-game in real-time
• Pub/sub messaging — send and receive messages on any channel
• Text chat ready — connect to any chat UI
• No dedicated server required — Ably handles the backend
Requires free Ably API key. Drop in, set API key, connect signals.

name: Supabase Auth
short_description: Complete Supabase auth — email, Google OAuth, Discord OAuth, password reset, user profiles and RLS.
description:
Full Supabase authentication for Godot 4:
• Email and password signup and login
• Google OAuth and Discord OAuth
• Password reset flow
• User profile table with RLS policies configured
• Session management — auto-login on relaunch
• Works in Godot, Unity or any web app
Requires Supabase project (free tier). Drop in, set URL and anon key, wire signals.

name: Supabase Storage
short_description: Store anything in Supabase buckets — text, JSON, images, profile pictures. Upload and download from Godot 4.
description:
Supabase storage integration for Godot 4:

Requires Supabase project. Drop in, set bucket name, call upload() or download().

name: WebViewCG — Android WebView Plugin
short_description: Fully customisable Android WebView for Godot 4.4 — multi-tab, JS bridge, pixel-perfect layout, native close button.

description:
Production-ready 3D Male character for Godot 4:

• Customisable outfits — swap looks without re-rigging

short_description: Game-ready 3D male character — 50+ animations, hitbox configured, customisable outfits. Drop into any BR game.
description:
Production-ready 3D male character for Godot 4:
• 50+ animations — combat, movement, emotes
